title: meliosma lepidota subsp. vulcanica
intro: Meliosma lepidota subsp. vulcanica, also known as the Vulcan meliosma, is a plant species native to the Philippines. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Meliosma lepidota subsp. vulcanica include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as its use as an antiseptic and astringent. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water, and it can be consumed as a tea or applied topically as a poultice.
